allow: Bash(python -m pip install pytest pytest-qt PyQt6)
Bash(python -m pip install PyQt6 pytest pytest-qt)
Bash(python -m pip install --index-url https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple PyQt6 pytest pytest-qt)
Bash(python -c "from src.ui.main_window import MainWindow; print\(''Import successful''\)")
Bash(python -c "from PyQt6.QtWidgets import QStyle; print\([attr for attr in dir\(QStyle\) if ''SP_'' in attr][:10]\)")
Bash(python -c "from PyQt6.QtWidgets import QStyle; print\([attr for attr in dir\(QStyle\) if not attr.startswith\(''_''\)][:30]\)")
Bash(python -c "from PyQt6.QtWidgets import QStyle; print\([attr for attr in dir\(QStyle.StandardPixmap\) if not attr.startswith\(''_''\)][:20]\)")
